title: Corelib test matrix green (42/42 just corelib)
body: Close the full `just corelib` gate: **42/42** targets in [`corelib_tests.bproj`](compiler/corelib/beskid_corelib/tests/corelib_tests/corelib_tests.bproj). W0–W6 compiler waves Done (HIR-free ISLE, canonical runtime, ABI-v5 kits, HIR retirement). Baseline no longer 5/42 — corelib gate substantially green. Remaining: LambdaExpression ISLE (CYB-173), TryExpression desugaring (CYB-174), macOS/Windows kit smokes (CYB-170/171).
